вӮҠвҠ№ The heat started bubbling in her chest. Her bunny tail twitched as her leg bounced up and down repetitively. Irritation and impatience grew. She wrapped her arms around them, nuzzling in the crook of their neck. Mine.

She had been woken up by the sounds of rustling. They were awake. God. It shouldвҖҷve been obvious, the humping, the clinginess. The overwhelming urge to want to be fucked. Impregnated. SheвҖҷd been unaware of her pre-heat this month. It was difficult to assimilate whether it was her true feelings for them talking or her libido. 

But now..? Now that she was irritatingly frustrated, her blue fluffy ears twitching and itching until theyвҖҷd woken up? It was obvious. She was going to be in heat.
